bead.title: test(agent): add unit tests for providers/models/check/route-status commands with httptest /v1/models stub
bead.description:
Opus epic review (2026-04-15): no CLI-level tests exist for providers/models/check/route-status. Unit tests cover only ValidateOrphanModel and the script-harness routing evidence path. The 4 commands are untested end-to-end.

Add cmd/agent_providers_test.go, agent_models_test.go, agent_check_test.go, agent_route_status_test.go using httptest to stub a fake /v1/models endpoint, run each command against a temp config that points at the stub, and assert the output includes the expected providers/models/status.
bead.acceptance: (1) 4 new test files exist, one per command. (2) Each file has at least: a success path, a provider-unreachable path, and an unexpected-error path. (3) All tests hermetic — httptest stub, no real network. (4) Coverage for the 4 commands > 60%.
